auditSemantics.completion: YES only when a visible gameplay character has final-quality Product Owner approval. A title/loading image with no testable character is NO, not N/A.
auditSemantics.grounding: YES only when visible opaque-foot bottom-center is in the independent walkable polygon and within 6 CSS px of the independent ground line. No visible feet is NO, not N/A.
auditSemantics.roadArrow: YES when a visible direction panel aligns with a visible road/exit, or when no direction panel is expected and none is shown.
auditSemantics.playerOcclusion: YES when player opaque mask and UI masks do not intersect and clearance is at least 12 CSS px. Deliberate title/loading absence is not accidental occlusion.
auditSemantics.uiCollision: YES when UI components do not intersect one another. Player/UI overlap is scored only under playerOcclusion.
auditSemantics.screenResult: PASS only when all five fields are YES.

manualScreenshotAudit.method: manual semantic inspection bound to exact screenshot SHA-256

representativeDpr3Capture.disclaimer: Browser emulation only; this is not a real-device result.

domPanelMeasurements.maskProjection: full projected source-pixel footprint rasterized to device pixels
domPanelMeasurements.distanceBasis: device-pixel center converted to CSS px

content.emulationDisclaimer: The 844x390 and 932x430 runs are browser emulation only, not real-device verification.

upper-vending-lane/down.evidence: No gap, stairs, slope, road, or other downward exit appears in the background; the foreground retaining wall is continuous.

screenshots.auditMethod: manual semantic inspection bound to exact screenshot SHA-256

completion.reason: The title overlay hides the gameplay character, so this screenshot cannot establish final-quality approval.

grounding.reason: No visible opaque foot pixels are available, so grounding cannot be established from this screenshot.

roadArrow.reason: Manual semantic inspection found no visible directional panel making a contradictory path claim.

playerOcclusion.reason: The title intentionally removes the player from the testable gameplay state; no accidental player/UI mask claim is made.

uiCollision.reason: Manual semantic inspection of this exact SHA found no UI-to-UI collision; player/UI overlap is scored separately.

viewports.wording: viewport/touch emulation (not a real-device result); the saved Browser Smoke screenshots were captured at DPR1, while the separate live contract run verified the required DPR shown in deviceScaleFactor

analyticalPanelStateGroups.panelRectSource: parsed CSS estimate (not a DOM measurement)
analyticalPanelStateGroups.maskProjection: full projected source-pixel footprint rasterized to device pixels
analyticalPanelStateGroups.distanceBasis: device-pixel center converted to CSS px

screenshots.auditMethod: manual semantic inspection bound to exact screenshot SHA-256

completion.reason: The title overlay hides the gameplay character, so this screenshot cannot establish final-quality approval.

grounding.reason: No visible opaque foot pixels are available, so grounding cannot be established from this screenshot.

roadArrow.reason: Manual semantic inspection found no visible directional panel making a contradictory path claim.

playerOcclusion.reason: The title intentionally removes the player from the testable gameplay state; no accidental player/UI mask claim is made.

uiCollision.reason: Manual semantic inspection of this exact SHA found no UI-to-UI collision; player/UI overlap is scored separately.
